description: A severe drought has gripped {location}. The rice paddies are cracked and dry, and the villagers pray daily for rain. Food prices have doubled in the past month.
Wells are running dry across {location}. The river is at its lowest in living memory, and the daimyō has ordered all shrines to perform rainmaking rituals.
The summer sun shows no mercy. {location} has seen no rain for forty days. The earth has turned to dust, and the farmers are desperate.
Torrential rains have caused the {river} to burst its banks near {location}. Fields and homes are flooded, and the roads are impassable.
A typhoon has swept through {location}, destroying fishing boats and flooding the coastal villages. Many are missing.
The melting snows in the mountains have swollen the rivers beyond their banks. {location} is turned into a vast lake, and the water shows no sign of receding.
A powerful earthquake shook {location} last night. Several buildings have collapsed, and the temple bell rang by itself.
The ground has been trembling for days in {location}. Landslides have blocked the passes, and a fissure has split the main road in two.
Rumours of a spreading sickness have reached {location}. People are burning herbs and avoiding crowded places. The healer's shop is full.
A deadly fever has broken out in the lower quarters of {location}. The monks have quarantined the temple, and the dead are piling up.
A gang of bandits has been raiding caravans along the road near {location}. The magistrate has posted a reward for their capture.
Bandits attacked a village in {province} last night, stealing grain and burning huts. The survivors are fleeing to the nearest town.
A notorious bandit chief, known as the Red Wolf, has been sighted near {location}. A huge bounty has been placed on his head.
A rebel force has risen in {province}, led by a disaffected samurai. They demand lower taxes and the removal of the Shogun's appointed officials.
The peasants in {location} have refused to pay the new rice tax. They have armed themselves with sickles and bamboo spears.
A skirmish has erupted on the border of {province}. Samurai from both sides are gathering, and war seems inevitable.
The armies of two rival clans have met near {location}. The battle lasted all day, and the fields are strewn with the dead.
A large merchant caravan has arrived in {location}, bringing exotic goods from the capital. Prices for silk and tea have dropped.
Ships from Ming China have docked in {location}. The market is flooded with copper coins and fine ceramics.
A salt caravan from the coast has reached {location}. Salt prices have fallen sharply, and the locals are stocking up for winter.
A shortage of {goods} has been felt across {location}. The reason is unclear — perhaps hoarding, or a disruption in the supply route.
The iron mines in {province} have been closed due to a cave-in. Iron prices have tripled overnight.
A blight has killed most of the silkworms in {location}. Silk production has collapsed, and prices are soaring.
The annual harvest festival has begun in {location}. Streets are decorated with lanterns, and sake flows freely.
A grand festival is being held at the shrine in {location} to honour the local kami. Pilgrims from all over {province} have arrived.
The daimyō of {province} has declared a week of celebration for the birth of his heir. There is dancing, feasting, and no taxes for the month.
Villagers near {location} claim to have seen a restless spirit at the crossroads. The local priest is preparing an exorcism.
The ghost of a murdered samurai is said to haunt the old battlefield near {location}. No one dares walk there after dark.
A kappa has been terrorising fishermen at the river near {location}. Several people have been dragged underwater.
A tengu was seen in the mountains near {location}. The yamabushi are warning travellers to stay on the main path.
A great whale has washed ashore on the coast of {location}. Some see it as an omen of disaster; others, a gift from the sea god.
The {clan} clan has announced a new tax on all goods passing through {location}. Merchants are outraged.
Rumours spread that the coinage in {province} has been debased. Merchants are refusing to accept certain coins.
A solar eclipse has darkened the sky above {location}. The sun vanished for minutes, and the people are terrified. The priests say it is a warning from the heavens.
A great comet with a fiery tail has appeared in the night sky over {province}. Some say it foretells the fall of a daimyō; others, a coming war.
A shower of shooting stars lit up the night over {location}. The children made wishes, and the old folks remembered a similar sight before the great famine.
Mount Fuji has erupted, sending a plume of ash over {province}. The sky is grey, and a fine dust covers the fields. Breathing is difficult.
A great wave struck the coast of {location} after a distant earthquake. Fishing boats were smashed, and the shore is littered with debris.
A swarm of locusts descended on {location} yesterday. They devoured everything green in their path. The rice harvest is lost.
A terrible fire has swept through the wooden houses of {location}. Half the town is in ashes, and many are homeless.
The great warehouse of {location} caught fire last night. Vast stores of rice and silk were destroyed. Merchants are ruined.
A young shrine maiden in {location} claims to have seen Amida Buddha in a dream. Pilgrims are flocking to the shrine.
A wandering monk performed a healing in {location}. A paralysed child walked again. The news is spreading.
The merchants of {location} are refusing to sell to traders from {neighbourProvince}. A bitter trade war is escalating.
The daimyō of {province} has ordered a blockade of the roads leading to {location}. No goods may enter or leave.
A trading vessel from Ming China has been wrecked on the rocks near {location}. The beach is strewn with silk and ceramics.
A flood of refugees from the war-torn north has arrived in {location}. The inns are full, and food is running low.
A famous swordsman, known throughout the land, has arrived in {location}. Young samurai flock to challenge him, and the inns are packed.
A dangerous prisoner has escaped from the magistrate's jail in {location}. The guards are searching everywhere, and a reward has been offered.
Rumours swirl that a chest of gold is buried in the hills near {location}. Treasure hunters have begun digging up the forest.
A decree from the Shogun has reached {province}: all weapons must be registered with the local magistrate. Samurai are furious.
A widespread famine is gripping {province}. The rice stores are empty, and the peasants are reduced to eating bark.
An unusually mild spring has brought a bounty of wild herbs and early fruit to {location}. The markets are overflowing.
A mysterious stranger arrived in {location} last night. He speaks little, but those who meet him feel an unshakeable sense of peace.
The temple in {location} has been haunted by a weeping spirit. The monks cannot rest, and visitors are too afraid to enter.
A rich vein of copper has been discovered in the mountains of {province}. Prospectors are rushing to stake their claims.
